user_query: I'm planning a weekend trip with my family and want to attend a horse racing event. Can you recommend a family-friendly horse racing venue and provide us with the horse statistics? Also, share the daily betting tips for the races.

TaskList.description: Research family-friendly horse racing venues in the specified area.
Retrieve statistics for horses participating in the upcoming races at the recommended venue.
Gather daily betting tips for the races at the chosen horse racing venue.
